form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 3rd of 11 at this track on March 21 over 1600m, 1.75 len behind Mr Fustic with 60kg at $4. The start before that 4th of 8 at this track on March 4 over 1600m, 1.5 len behind Roaring Ralph with 57kg at $9.50. Can run a better race this time.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start favourite; won by 0.8 len at Wolverhampton March 30 over 1700m defeating Brinton with 59.5kg at $4.30. The run before that favourite; won by 0.8 len at this track March 10 over 1400m defeating War Memorial carrying 61kg at $5.50. An inside barrier is a big advantage. In great form and can go on with it.

The run before that second last of 9 at Wolverhampton on February 23 over 1400m, 6 len behind Fistral Beach carrying 61kg at $26.
